description: Displays a summary of validation errors from a cascading EditContext. Supports automatic visibility based on error state or manual mode with explicit Show control.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Title text displayed at the top of the error summary. Falls back to a localized default.

parameters.name: ShowErrorsList
parameters.description: When true, individual error messages are listed below the title. Default: true.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class(es) for the root element.

parameters.name: ManualMode
parameters.description: When true, visibility is controlled by the Show parameter instead of automatic error detection.

parameters.name: Show
parameters.description: Controls visibility when ManualMode is true. Ignored in automatic mode.

examples.title: Manual mode with custom title
examples.code: <TmValidationSummary ManualMode="true" Show="@hasErrors" Title="Please fix the following errors:" />
